allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; types=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[''data''][''__schema''][''types'']; [print\(t[''name'']\) for t in types if ''acf'' in t[''name''].lower\(\) or ''Acf'' in t[''name''] or ''flexible'' in t[''name''].lower\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; fields=[f[''name''] for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)[''data''][''__type''][''fields'']]; print\(''content'' in fields, ''| fields:'', [f for f in fields if f in [''content'',''title'',''slug'',''acfFields'']]\)")
